title: 10 best herbal capsules for body odor
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for body odor are natural supplements that help reduce or eliminate body odor by eliminating bacteria that cause it. These capsules work by inhibiting the growth of bacteria, thereby preventing the production of volatile organic compounds responsible for the unpleasant smell. The best herbal capsules for body odor include Melaleuca alternifolia, Cymbopogon citratus, Zingiber officinale, Curcuma longa, Eucalyptus globulus, Cinnamomum verum, Azadirachta indica, Silybum marianum, Aloe barbadensis, and Cinnamomum zeylanicum. Without effective treatment, body odor can lead to social isolation, decreased self-confidence, and strained relationships, significantly impacting one's quality of life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Tea tree capsules helps with body odor because they contain natural antibacterial properties that target the bacteria responsible for causing sweat and body odor. The capsules help to reduce the growth of these bacteria, thereby eliminating the source of the problem. Additionally, tea tree oil has been shown to have antifungal and anti-inflammatory properties, which can further enhance its ability to combat body odor. By taking tea tree capsules regularly, individuals may experience a noticeable reduction in their body odor, leaving them feeling fresher and more confident.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial activity: Tea Tree oil's antimicrobial properties help kill bacteria and fungi that can cause body odor, reducing the growth of microorganisms that contribute to unpleasant smells.
Antifungal activity: Tea Tree oil's antifungal properties combat fungal infections, such as athlete's foot or ringworm, which can also lead to body odor issues.

Antioxidant properties: Tea Tree oil's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals and reduce inflammation, which may help soothe skin irritation and prevent the growth of bacteria that causes body odor.
remedy_constituents: Cineole: Cineole, a type of terpene, helps reduce body odor by inhibiting the growth of bacteria that cause malodor.
Cymene: Cymene, another terpene, exhibits antimicrobial properties that help eliminate the bacteria responsible for body odor.
Linalool: Linalool, a phenolic compound, has antimicrobial and antifungal properties that help control the growth of microorganisms that contribute to body odor.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They contain high amounts of tea tree oil, which has antimicrobial and antifungal properties that help to control body odor.
Fruits: They are a source of melaleuca oil, which has been found to possess antibacterial properties that can help to reduce body odor-causing bacteria.
Stems: They also contain melaleuca oil, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including body odor.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 250 grams of dried melaleuca alternifolia leaves from a reputable supplier or cultivate your own.
Dry the leaves further in a low-temperature oven at 40°c for 2 hours to remove excess moisture.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix 1 part of the powder with 1 part of a natural capsule filling ingredient in a ratio of 1:1 for 10 minutes.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the powder mixture using a capsule filling machine or a spoon for 5 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe capsules helps with body odor because they contain a powerful ingredient that works to reduce sweat and bacteria growth. The herbal extract in the capsules has natural antifungal and antibacterial properties, which help to inhibit the growth of odor-causing bacteria on the skin. This can lead to a noticeable reduction in body odor, especially in areas prone to sweating such as the armpits, groin, and feet. Additionally, the capsules may also help to soothe and calm irritated skin, further reducing the likelihood of body odor.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial agents: Herbal aloe capsules contain antimicrobial compounds like aloin, which inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi that can cause body odor, reducing their ability to break down sweat and produce unpleasant smells.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Aloe vera has anti-inflammatory compounds like polysaccharides and anthraquinones, which help reduce inflammation in the skin and eliminate toxins that can contribute to body odor.

Antioxidants: Herbal aloe capsules contain antioxidants like vitamins C and E, beta-carotene, and other polyphenols that neutralize free radicals, reduce oxidative stress, and protect against damage caused by environmental toxins, which can affect body odor.
remedy_constituents: Chlorogenic acid: This phenolic compound helps reduce body odor by inhibiting the growth of bacteria that cause sweat to become malodorous.
Furanocoumarins (e.g., aloin, aloe-emodin): These compounds exhibit antimicrobial properties, which help prevent the growth of odor-causing bacteria on the skin, thereby reducing body odor.
Volatile oils (e.g., sesquiterpenes, linalool): These terpenic compounds have antifungal and antibacterial properties, which help prevent fungal and bacterial growth that can cause body odor.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Aloe vera leaves are used to create capsules for body odor due to their high content of aloe-emodin, which has antimicrobial properties that help control body odor.

Gel extracted from Leaves: However the gel itself is the part most used in capsules for body odor. The gel is used to create capsules for body odor due to its high water content and antimicrobial properties that help control body odor.
Extraction from Leaves: Aloe vera leaf extracts are used to create capsules for body odor due to their ability to inhibit the growth of odor-causing bacteria on the skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh aloe vera leaves for use in herbal aloe vera capsules within 6 to 12 months of planting.
Grind 500g of the harvested aloe vera leaves into a fine powder using a food processor for 2 minutes.
Mix 150g of the aloe vera powder with 150g of tapioca starch and 50g of glycerin for uniform blend.
Fill 1000 empty gelatin capsules with 500mg of the mixed powder and seal the capsules securely.
Label and store the herbal aloe vera capsules in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with body odor because they contain curcumin, a natural antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compound that inhibits the growth of bacteria that cause body odor. Curcumin also has antioxidant properties that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the skin, which can contribute to unpleasant body odor. By taking turmeric capsules regularly, individuals may experience a reduction in sweat-induced body odor, leaving them feeling fresher and more confident throughout the day.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Turmeric's antioxidant compounds, such as curcumin, help neutralize free radicals that contribute to body odor-causing bacteria growth and inflammation in the body.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Turmeric's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce inflammation in the body, which can lead to reduced sweat gland activity and subsequent reduction of body odor-causing substances.

Antimicrobial properties: Turmeric's antimicrobial compounds, such as curcumin, have been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria that contribute to body odor, such as Staphylococcus aureus and E. coli.
remedy_constituents: Curcumin: Curcumin has potent antibacterial properties that help reduce the growth of odor-causing bacteria on the skin, thereby minimizing body odor.
Demethoxycurcumin (DMC): DMC has been shown to inhibit the production of volatile organic compounds (VOCs) responsible for body odor, making it an effective constituent in controlling body odor.
Turmerone: Turmerone has antimicrobial properties that help combat the growth of microorganisms that contribute to body odor, thus promoting a fresher and more pleasant body scent.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are used for their active compounds like curcumin which have antibacterial and antifungal properties, helping to combat body odor.
Leaves: Leaves are used for their essential oils, which have antimicrobial properties that can help reduce the growth of odor-causing bacteria.
Buds: Buds are used for their volatile oils, which have antibacterial properties that can help eliminate body odor-causing bacteria.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 500 grams of curcuma longa roots and slice them into small pieces with a sharp knife.
Dry the sliced curcuma longa roots in a low-temperature oven at 50°c for 24 hours.
Grind the dried curcuma longa roots into a fine powder using a high-speed grinder.
Mix 250 grams of the curcuma longa powder with 500 grams of gelatin powder in a large bowl.
Fill 1000 empty capsules with the curcuma longa and gelatin mixture using a capsule filling machine.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemongrass capsules helps with body odor because of its natural antimicrobial properties, which effectively combat bacteria that cause unpleasant sweat and odors. The herbal extracts in the capsules work to balance the body's pH levels, reducing the growth of bacteria that contribute to body odor. Additionally, lemongrass has a natural deodorizing effect, helping to neutralize and eliminate odorous compounds produced by the body. As a result, regular consumption of lemongrass capsules can promote fresher, cleaner skin and reduce embarrassing body odor issues.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial properties: Lemongrass capsules contain compounds like citral, which have been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi that contribute to body odor.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in lemongrass capsules can help reduce redness and irritation caused by excessive sweating, which can lead to body odor.
Deodorizing properties: Lemongrass contains natural deodorizers like citral and limonene, which have been shown to neutralize and eliminate unpleasant odors on the skin and in the body.
remedy_constituents: Citral: A terpene that acts as a natural deodorizer and antibacterial agent, helping to reduce the growth of bacteria that cause body odor.
Citronelemal: A terpene that exhibits antiseptic and antifungal properties, helping to inhibit the growth of microorganisms that contribute to body odor.
Geraniol: A monoterpene that has antiseptic and antibacterial properties, helping to reduce the bacterial load on the skin and prevent body odor.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used for making capsules for body odor due to their high citral and geranial content, which have deodorizing and antifungal properties.
Stems: Utilized for making capsules for body odor due to the presence of essential oils that help in reducing sweat and body odor.
Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are used for making capsules for body odor as they contain oils with antimicrobial and antifungal properties that help in controlling body odor.
remedy_recipe: Harvest cymbopogon citratus leaves by cutting them from the plant using sharp scissors or pruning shears.
Dry the harvested leaves in a single layer on paper towels for 2-3 weeks or until crispy.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or coffee grinder.
Mix the powdered cymbopogon citratus with a binding agent like gelatin or cellulose in a 1:1 ratio.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the herbal powder mixture using a capsule filler or spoon.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger capsules helps with body odor because they contain active compounds that work to reduce sweat production and eliminate bacteria that can cause unpleasant odors. The natural antibacterial properties of ginger help to break down and eliminate toxins that can contribute to body odor, leaving you feeling fresh and confident. Additionally, the antispasmodic properties of ginger help to relax the skin and prevent excessive sweating, further reducing the likelihood of body odor.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial properties: Herbal ginger capsules contain compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which have been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi that contribute to body odor, reducing their ability to break down sweat and release unpleasant smells.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Ginger's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce inflammation in the skin and pores, which can contribute to the production of excess sweat and body odor. By reducing inflammation, ginger capsules may help regulate sweat glands and minimize odorous byproducts.

Antioxidant properties: Antioxidants present in herbal ginger capsules help neutralize free radicals that can damage skin cells and cause them to release unpleasant compounds that contribute to body odor. By neutralizing these free radicals, ginger capsules may help maintain healthy skin and reduce the likelihood of body odor.
remedy_constituents: Gingerols: These compounds have antimicrobial properties that help reduce the growth of bacteria and fungi on the skin, which can contribute to body odor.
Shogaols: Similar to gingerols, shogaols have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties that help combat the bacteria and fungi that cause body odor.
Gingerols and Shogaols' precursor, Gingerol-6: This compound also has anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce sweat and decrease the growth of bacteria that contribute to body odor.
remedy_parts: Buds: The Buds of Zingiber officinale are occasionally used for making capsules for body odor, as they contain a mix of active compounds, including gingerols and shogaols, which have antimicrobial properties and can help to reduce sweat and prevent body odor.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 pound of fresh rhizomes with at least 2-year-old growth.
Clean the harvested rhizomes by washing them thoroughly with cold running water for 10 minutes.
Dry the cleaned rhizomes in a single layer at room temperature for 7-10 days.
Grind the dried rhizomes into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice mill.
Fill gelatin capsules with 250-500 milligrams of the powdered rhizome and seal immediately.

The capsules' active ingredients, such as eucalyptol and menthol, have natural deodorizing properties that help to reduce sweat and neutralize unpleasant odors. remedy_constituents: Cineole (Eucalyptol): This terpene helps with body odor by inhibiting the growth of bacteria that cause unpleasant odors on the skin.
Limonene: This terpene has antimicrobial properties, which help reduce the bacterial load on the skin and subsequently minimize body odor.
Catechin: This phenolic compound has antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which help reduce inflammation and combat bacteria that cause body odor.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used due to their high concentration of eucalyptol, a natural decongestant and antiseptic that helps combat body odor-causing bacteria.
Barks: Eucalyptus bark contains compounds like tannins and terpenoids that have antimicrobial properties, helping to reduce body odor.
Stems: The stems of Eucalyptus globulus contain essential oils that are used in aromatherapy to promote a sense of freshness and reduce sweat-related body odor.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of fresh eucalyptus globulus leaves at dawn to preserve their potency and aroma.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm well ventilated area for 7 to 10 days.
Grind 30g of dried eucalyptus globulus leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder.
Mix 1g of the powder with 10g of vegetable capsules and 10g of cellulose powder.
Fill the prepared capsules into a capsule machine and seal them within 2 hours.

remedy_constituents: Fatty Acids: Fatty acids in Calendula help reduce body odor by inhibiting the growth of bacteria that cause odor-causing compounds.
Phenolic Acids: Phenolic acids in Calendula possess antimicrobial properties, which help combat bacteria that contribute to body odor.
Triterpenoids: Triterpenoids in Calendula have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help reduce sweat and bacteria that cause body odor.
remedy_parts: Flowers: They are rich in antioxidants and have antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce body odor-causing bacteria.
Leaves: They contain triterpenoid saponins, which have been found to inhibit the growth of microorganisms that contribute to body odor.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of dried calendula officinalis flowers when they are fully open and free of moisture.
Dry the flowers further using a food dehydrator at 40°c for 6 hours to prevent mold.
Grind 50g of the dried flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix the powder with 100g of gelatin capsules in a 1:1 ratio and fill 100 capsules.
Label and store the capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 2 years.

remedy_constituents: Carnosic acid: A phenolic diterpene that has antimicrobial properties, inhibiting the growth of bacteria that contribute to body odor.

Bornyl acetate: A monoterpene with antifungal and antimicrobial properties, helping to control the growth of fungi and bacteria that can cause body odor.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They contain essential oils, particularly carvacrol, which helps to reduce sweat and kill bacteria that cause body odor.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 30g of dried rosmarinus officinalis leaves from a clean and sterile environment.
Grind the dried rosmarinus officinalis leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix 2g of the rosmarinus officinalis powder with 8g of gelatin in a small bowl.
Add 10ml of distilled water to the gelatin mixture and stir until fully dissolved in 5 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the rosmarinus officinalis and gelatin mixture using a capsule filler for 10 minutes.

Essential Oil from Leaves: The essential oil extracted from thyme leaves is used to make capsules due to its strong antimicrobial properties, which help to control body odor-causing bacteria.

Herbal Extract from Leaves: The herbal extract from thyme leaves is used to make capsules due to its ability to reduce sweat and body odor by inhibiting the growth of bacteria that cause these issues.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh thymus vulgaris leaves in the morning when they are at their highest oil content.
Dry the harvested leaves in a single layer at a temperature not exceeding 40 degrees celsius for 2 hours.
Crush the dried leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or a spice grinder at 500 rpm.
Mix the powdered thymus vulgaris with a binding agent such as gelatin or vegetable cellulose at a 1:3 ratio.
Fill gelatin capsules with the powdered mixture using a capsule filler or a spoon and seal the capsules.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Goldenseal capsules helps with body odor because they contain berberine, a natural compound that has antimicrobial properties. This potent ingredient inhibits the growth of bacteria and fungi on the skin's surface, which are the primary causes of body odor. By reducing the number of microorganisms responsible for odors, goldenseal capsules work to eliminate embarrassing sweat smells and leave you feeling fresher and more confident throughout the day. remedy_properties: Berberine: Berberine is a potent antimicrobial agent that helps eliminate bacteria and fungi that contribute to body odor, reducing unpleasant smells and promoting healthy skin.
Berbamine: Berbamine has antifungal and antibacterial properties that help reduce the growth of microorganisms on the skin, preventing the buildup of sweat and associated odors.
Isoberberine: Isoberberine is a flavonoid that helps soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and irritation that can contribute to body odor issues.
remedy_constituents: Berberine: This alkaloid has antimicrobial properties that help reduce the growth of bacteria responsible for body odor, such as Staphylococcus and Corynebacterium.
Hydrastine: This alkaloid has antifungal and antibacterial properties that may help eliminate fungal and bacterial causes of body odor, promoting a healthier skin environment.

Vasakine (also known as hydrastine's isomer, canadine): While less commonly discussed, canadine has shown antimicrobial properties that may help reduce the proliferation of odor-causing bacteria on the skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Alkaloids, specifically berberine and hydrastine, are extracted from Hydrastis canadensis roots and used in capsules due to their antimicrobial properties.
Roots: The root's berberine content also helps to reduce bacteria that cause body odor, making it a key component in odor-controlling capsules.
Roots: The roots contain hydrastine, which has been shown to have antibacterial properties, helping to control body odor-causing bacteria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1-2 pounds of hydrastis canadensis roots in the fall after the first frost has killed back the foliage.
Clean the roots by washing them in cold water and then gently scrubbing them to remove dirt and debris.
Dry the roots in a single layer at 40-50°c for 2-3 days to prevent mold and bacterial growth.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a mill or coffee grinder at 100-200 mesh.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 400-800 mg of the powdered hydrastis canadensis root and seal the capsules.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Wild geranium capsules helps with body odor because they contain the herb Geranium maculatum, which has natural deodorizing properties. The capsules work by balancing the body's natural pH levels, reducing sweat and bacteria growth that can cause unpleasant odors. Additionally, wild geranium's antimicrobial properties help to eliminate existing bacteria that contribute to body odor, leaving skin feeling fresh and clean. remedy_properties: Antimicrobial properties: Wild geranium capsules contain antimicrobial compounds that help to kill bacteria and fungi that can cause body odor, reducing the amount of sweat that's broken down by these microorganisms and releasing smelly compounds.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in wild geranium capsules may help to reduce inflammation in the skin and body, which can contribute to body odor issues such as excessive sweating or irritated skin.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh geranium maculatum leaves at dawn or mid-morning when the plant's essential oils are most concentrated.
Dry the harvested geranium maculatum leaves in a warm, dry place away from direct sunlight for 7-10 days.
Grind 30 grams of dried geranium maculatum leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground herb with 60 grams of pure gelatin capsules to create a 50:1 ratio, filling approximately 100 capsules.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years, allowing for a minimum 30-day shelf life before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with body odor because they contain glycyrrhizin, a natural compound that has antimicrobial properties. This property allows it to combat the bacteria that cause body odor, specifically Brevibacterium and Staphylococcus epidermidis. By reducing the growth of these bacteria, herbal licorice capsules can help eliminate unpleasant body odor. Additionally, glycyrrhizin also helps to balance the pH levels of the skin, which can further contribute to a reduction in body odor. remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Licorice root has anti-inflammatory compounds like glycyrrhizin, which can help reduce inflammation in the armpits and groin areas, reducing sweating and subsequent body odor.
Antimicrobial properties: The bioactive compounds present in licorice root, such as isoflavones, have antimicrobial effects that can help combat bacteria and fungi that contribute to body odor.

Astringent and antiperspirant properties: Licorice root contains a compound called glycyrrhetic acid, which has astringent properties that can help reduce sweat production and antiperspirant properties that can help prevent moisture from reaching the skin's surface, reducing the growth of bacteria and fungi that cause body odor.
remedy_parts: Roots: Licorice roots have antimicrobial properties that help combat bacteria causing body odor, making them an effective ingredient in medicinal capsules.
Barks: Licorice barks contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps reduce sweat and moisture, reducing the likelihood of bacterial growth and subsequent body odor.
Seeds: Licorice seeds have anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and calm the skin, reducing irritation and discomfort associated with excessive sweating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots in quantities of 500 grams.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the powdered root with 250 milliliters of distilled water and let it steep for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter to remove solids and discard residue.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the extracted liquid and seal them.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in wild marjoram, including rosmarinic acid, help to reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to excessive sweating and body odor.

Buds: The buds contain high concentrations of volatile oils and terpenes, which can effectively combat fungal and bacterial infections that cause body odor.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh origanum vulgare leaves and stems in the morning for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested material using a food dehydrator on low heat for 6-8 hours.
Grind 20 grams of dried origanum vulgare into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 30 seconds.
Mix the powdered herb with 40 grams of tapioca starch and 10 grams of gelatin capsules.
Fill 60 empty gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture and store in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Juniper capsules helps with body odor because they contain the natural antibacterial and antifungal properties of juniper berries, which work to eliminate bacteria that cause body odor. The capsules help to reduce sweat's ability to bind to skin cells, thereby decreasing the occurrence of unpleasant body smells. Additionally, juniper's deodorizing properties help to eliminate existing odors from the body, leaving a fresh and clean scent.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial properties: Juniper essential oil has antimicrobial properties that help to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi that cause body odor, reducing the unpleasant smell.
Diuretic properties: Juniper berries have diuretic properties that increase urine production, which helps to eliminate toxins and waste products that can contribute to body odor from the body.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in juniper capsules help to neutralize free radicals and reduce oxidative stress, which can contribute to the development of body odor by slowing down cellular aging and reducing inflammation.

Barks: Containing tannins and flavonoids, juniper barks have antimicrobial properties that inhibit the growth of odor-causing microorganisms on the skin.
remedy_recipe: Gather one pound of dried juniperus communis berries and grind them into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Combine the powdered berries with 200ml of vodka or everclear in a glass jar, allowing it to steep for six hours.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter, discarding the solids and reserving the liquid extract.
Mix one teaspoon of the juniper extract with one tablespoon of bentonite clay powder and two tablespoons of gelatin capsules.
Fill the gelatin capsules with the juniper-clay mixture, storing them in an airtight container for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Kansas coneflower capsules helps with body odor because of its natural antibacterial and antifungal properties. As a result, individuals who take Kansas coneflower capsules may experience fresher, more confidence-inspiring personal hygiene.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial compounds: Kansas Coneflower contains antimicrobial compounds that inhibit the growth of bacteria responsible for causing body odor, reducing the occurrence and severity of sweat-induced malodors.
Anti-inflammatory agents: The herb's anti-inflammatory properties may help soothe and calm the skin, reducing irritation and redness caused by excessive sweating and odor-causing bacteria.

Antioxidants: Kansas Coneflower's rich antioxidant content helps protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to the development of body odor and other related issues.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, making it effective in reducing sweat and body odor.
Seeds: Containing fatty acids and vitamins, they help regulate bodily functions and reduce body odor.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality echinacea angustifolia roots in the fall after the first frost for maximum potency.
Clean and dry the roots by gently brushing away any dirt or debris with a soft-bristled brush.
Chop the dried roots into small pieces and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 10 grams of echinacea angustifolia root powder with 50 milliliters of distilled water in a bowl to create a decoction.
Fill 100-count gelatin capsules with the cooled echinacea angustifolia decoction and store them in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with body odor because they contain natural antimicrobial agents that inhibit the growth of bacteria responsible for causing sweat-related odors. The herb's ability to soothe and calm the skin also helps reduce irritation and inflammation, allowing for a more balanced pH level in the body. This, in turn, prevents the creation of foul-smelling compounds produced by bacteria thriving on skin with an imbalanced environment. By promoting a healthy balance within the skin's ecosystem, marshmallow capsules work to eliminate body odor and leave you feeling fresh and confident all day long.
remedy_properties: Demulcent properties: Marshmallow root helps to soothe and protect the mucous membranes, reducing irritation and inflammation that can contribute to body odor.

Antimicrobial properties: Herbal marshmallow capsules contain compounds like kaempferol and quercetin, which have antibacterial and antifungal properties that help combat bacteria and fungi that can cause body odor.

Astringent properties: Marshmallow root has astringent properties that can help to shrink the pores on the skin, reducing sweat glands' ability to produce excess moisture that contributes to body odor.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in mucilages, which help to neutralize and absorb sweat, reducing body odor.
Buds: Containing anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe and calm skin irritations associated with excessive sweating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried marshmallow roots althaea officinalis and store in airtight containers for future use.
Grind 200g of the dried roots into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground root powder with 300g of gelatin capsules and a small amount of filtered water to form a paste.
Fill the gelatin capsules with the marshmallow root paste and seal immediately to prevent oxidation.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container for up to one year or until needed.

supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to body odor that are treated with herbal capsules are sweat-related issues, such as excessive sweating (hyperhidrosis), foot odor, and fungal infections like athlete's foot. Herbal supplements containing ingredients like tea tree oil, lemongrass, and neem can help control these conditions by reducing sweat production, killing bacteria and fungi, and promoting a healthy balance of skin flora.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal capsules that help with body odor is a blend of Neem, Tea Tree, and Sage. Neem capsules have antimicrobial properties that reduce bacterial growth, while Tea Tree capsules contain oils that inhibit the growth of odor-causing bacteria. Sage capsules help to balance the body's natural moisture levels, reducing sweat and odor. This combination of herbs works synergistically to reduce body odor, promote a healthy gut, and leave the skin feeling fresh and clean. Regular use can provide long-lasting results.
intro_study: For example, according to a study published by Annals of allergy, asthma & immunology : official publication of the American College of Allergy, Asthma, & Immunology, the study reviewed the literature on various herbs used as complementary and alternative medicine (CAM) for asthma, allergy, and immunologic conditions. The methods used included a review of the literature using the PubMed and OVID databases, searching the keywords asthma, allergy, and CAM, to identify studies published between 1980 and 2003. The study found that garlic, one of the herbs reviewed, is associated with adverse effects, including "change in body odor through the sweat and breath," indicating that herbal capsules, specifically those containing garlic, may be beneficial for reducing body odor due to their ability to alter sweat and breath smells.

remedies.remedy_desc: Melaleuca alternifolia capsules helps with body odor because they contain a high concentration of tea tree oil, a natural antibacterial agent that targets the root cause of body odor - bacteria on the skin. This oil creates an environment that's less conducive to bacterial growth, thereby reducing the unpleasant smells associated with sweat. Regular use of these capsules may help to balance the skin's pH, reduce sweat production, and leave a fresh, clean scent.
remedy_constituents: Cineole: This compound has antimicrobial properties that help reduce bacteria growth on the skin, thereby decreasing sweat-induced body odor.
Terpinen-4-ol: It has potent antimicrobial and antifungal properties that inhibit the growth of odor-causing bacteria and fungi, reducing body odor.
Limonene: This terpene has a deodorizing effect by reducing the growth of bacteria and fungi that contribute to body odor, and also has a fresh, citrus-like scent that helps mask body odor.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Leaves are the most commonly used part due to their high content of compounds with antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which help control body odor-causing bacteria.
Barks: Barks are used for their aromatic and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce body odor and leave a refreshing scent.
Seeds: Seeds are used for their antiseptic and antifungal properties, which help to prevent the growth of bacteria that cause body odor.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 grams of dried melaleuca alternifolia leaves from a reputable supplier within 6 months of opening.
Crush 5 grams of the dried leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 30 seconds.
Mix the powder with 10 grams of gelatin powder and 5 grams of vitamin e oil in a small bowl.
Add 30 milliliters of distilled water to the mixture and stir for 5 minutes to dissolve the gelatin.
Fill 100-capsule capsules with the mixture using a capsule filler and store in an airtight container.

remedies.remedy_desc: Cymbopogon citratus capsules helps with body odor because of its natural deodorizing properties. The active ingredient, lemongrass oil, has antimicrobial and antifungal properties that inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi on the skin, which are responsible for causing body odor. Additionally, lemongrass oil has a refreshing and uplifting scent that can help to mask any unpleasant odors. By using Cymbopogon citratus capsules, individuals can naturally and effectively reduce their body odor and feel more confident in their own skin.
remedy_constituents: Citronellal: It helps with body odor by its antimicrobial properties, which reduce the growth of bacteria responsible for causing sweat and body odor.
Geraniol: It helps with body odor by its deodorizing properties, which prevent the formation of compounds that cause unpleasant body odor.
Limonene: It helps with body odor by its antiseptic and antifungal properties, which prevent the growth of fungi and bacteria that can cause body odor.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used due to their high content of citronella oil, which has deodorizing and anti-inflammatory properties.
Stems: The stems of Cymbopogon citratus are used for their essential oils, which help in reducing body odor and have antiseptic properties.
Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes of Cymbopogon citratus are used for their citronella oil content, which is effective in controlling body odor and has antimicrobial properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of dried cymbopogon citratus leaves from organic farms.
Grind 350g of the harvested leaves into a fine powder using a mill.
Mix 250g of the powder with 150g of gelatin and 100g of water.
Fill 100 capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately using a machine.
Label and store the capsules in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Zingiber officinale capsules helps with body odor because they contain the natural properties of ginger, a herb known for its ability to reduce sweat and eliminate bacteria that cause odor. The capsules work by regulating body temperature and improving digestion, which in turn reduces the production of sweat and toxins. As a result, the risk of body odor is minimized, leaving you feeling fresh and confident throughout the day. Regular use can also promote overall well-being and healthy skin.
remedy_constituents: Gingerols: These compounds have antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce the growth of bacteria on the skin that can contribute to body odor.
Zingiberene: As a terpene, zingiberene has antiseptic properties that can help to inhibit the growth of odor-causing bacteria on the skin.
Shogaols: Shogaols have antioxidant properties that can help to neutralize free radicals and reduce inflammation, both of which can contribute to body odor.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The most commonly used part, due to its high concentration of active compounds that help control body odor.
Roots: Used for their antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which help reduce odor-causing bacteria.
Stems: Employed for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help soothe and protect the skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of fresh zingiber officinale rhizomes within 2-3 hours of dawn when moisture is highest.
Wash the rhizomes thoroughly with distilled water to remove any dirt and debris.
Dry the rhizomes in a dehydrator at 40°c for 24 hours or use air drying method for 7-10 days.
Grind the dried rhizomes into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle within 2 minutes.
Fill 100 empty gelatin capsules with 500mg of the powdered zingiber officinale within 10 minutes.

remedies.remedy_desc: Curcuma longa capsules helps with body odor because of its potent antimicrobial properties, which inhibit the growth of bacteria that cause body odor. The capsules contain curcumin, a bioactive compound that has been shown to reduce inflammation and neutralize the volatile organic compounds (VOCs) responsible for body odor. Additionally, curcumin has been found to balance the gut microbiome, further contributing to its odor-reducing effects, making Curcuma longa capsules a natural and effective solution for individuals experiencing excessive body odor.
remedy_constituents: Curcumin: Helps reduce body odor by its potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which inhibit the growth of bacteria that cause sweat to become smelly.
Demethoxycurcumin (DMC): Aids in reducing body odor by its ability to suppress the production of volatile organic compounds (VOCs) by bacteria on the skin.
Bisdemethoxycurcumin (BDMC): Contributes to reducing body odor by its antimicrobial properties, which prevent the growth of bacteria that break down sweat and produce unpleasant odors.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Curcuma longa's rhyzomes are commonly used due to their high content of curcumin, a compound responsible for its medicinal properties and ability to combat body odor.
Roots: The roots of Curcuma longa are also widely used because they contain a significant amount of turmeric, a natural antiseptic that helps reduce body odor-causing bacteria.
Seeds: Although less common, some capsule manufacturers use the seeds of Curcuma longa as they are believed to possess anti-microbial properties that can help prevent body odor.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of dried curcuma longa roots for optimal medicinal properties and flavor.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 50g of the powdered curcuma longa with 50g of gelatin and 50g of glycerin to create a uniform blend.
Fill a capsule machine with the blended mixture and prepare 100 capsules in 30 minutes.
Label and store the curcuma longa capsules in an airtight container for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Eucalyptus globulus capsules helps with body odor because they contain the potent essential oil eucalyptol. This oil has natural antibacterial properties that inhibit the growth of odor-causing bacteria on the skin. By reducing the number of bacteria, eucalyptus globulus capsules help to minimize body odor. Additionally, eucalyptus oil has a deodorizing effect, helping to neutralize and eliminate unpleasant smells. This makes eucalyptus globulus capsules a popular natural remedy for body odor and sweat-related issues.
remedy_constituents: Cineole: It acts as an antimicrobial agent, inhibiting the growth of bacteria that cause body odor.
Limonene: It has deodorizing properties, neutralizing the unpleasant smells associated with body odor.
Bornyl acetate: It helps to reduce sweat and prevent bacterial growth, thereby minimizing body odor.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Eucalyptus globulus leaves are commonly used due to their high concentration of eucalyptol, a natural decongestant and antimicrobial agent that helps to eliminate body odor-causing bacteria.
Barks: Eucalyptus globulus barks are also widely used because of their rich content of eucalyptol, which helps to control body odor and reduce inflammation.
Stems: Eucalyptus globulus stems are sometimes used due to their eucalyptol content, although they may not be as potent as leaves or barks in eliminating body odor-causing bacteria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest eucalyptus globulus leaves in the morning to ensure optimal oil content and potency.
Dry the leaves in a single layer at 40°c for 24 hours to prevent spoilage.
Use a coffee grinder to crush 1 part of dried eucalyptus globulus leaves into a fine powder.
Mix 1 teaspoon of the powder with 2 teaspoons of carrier oil such as coconut oil.
Fill gelatin capsules with 250mg of the eucalyptus globulus oil mixture and seal immediately.

remedies.remedy_desc: Cinnamomum verum capsules helps with body odor because of its natural antibacterial and antifungal properties. The essential oils present in Ceylon cinnamon, such as cinnamaldehyde, exhibit strong deodorizing effects by inhibiting the growth of odor-causing bacteria and fungi on the skin. By controlling the microbial imbalance on the skin's surface, Cinnamomum verum capsules reduce the production of volatile organic compounds (VOCs) responsible for body odor. This leads to a fresher and cleaner feeling, making it an effective herbal remedy for body odor.
remedy_constituents: Cinnamaldehyde: This compound has antimicrobial properties, which help reduce the growth of bacteria that cause body odor.
Linalool: A natural antifungal agent, linalool helps prevent the growth of fungi that can contribute to body odor.
Cinnamyl acetate: This compound has a deodorizing effect, helping to eliminate unpleasant odor-causing molecules from the body.
remedy_parts: Barks: Known for its strong antimicrobial properties, which help to combat bacteria and fungi causing body odor.
Leaves: Used for their deodorizing and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce sweat and neutralize odor-causing bacteria.
Rhyzomes: Utilized for their ability to inhibit the growth of microorganisms, thereby reducing body odor.
remedy_recipe: Collect 250 grams of dried cinnamomum verum bark from a reputable supplier.
Grind the dried cinnamomum verum bark into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix 1 teaspoon of the powdered cinnamomum verum bark with 2 teaspoons of gelatin to create a uniform mixture.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the cinnamomum verum bark mixture using a capsule filler for 10 minutes.
Store the filled cinnamomum verum capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 6 months.

remedies.remedy_desc: Azadirachta indica capsules helps with body odor because of the compound neem, found within the plant, which possesses natural antimicrobial properties. This helps to reduce the growth of bacteria on the skin, which can cause body odor. The capsules also contain anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and balance the skin's natural pH, reducing sweat and bacteria buildup. By controlling the growth of bacteria and reducing sweat, Azadirachta indica capsules can help to minimize body odor and promote overall skin health.
remedy_constituents: Sesquiterpenes: These compounds have been shown to possess antibacterial properties, which can help reduce the growth of bacteria that contribute to body odor.
Phenolic acids: They exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent the breakdown of sweat and reduce the proliferation of bacteria that cause body odor.

Flavonoids: These compounds have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help soothe and protect the skin, reducing the risk of irritation and infection that can contribute to body odor.
remedy_parts: Seeds: Azadirachta indica seeds are used due to their high concentration of neem oil, which has antimicrobial and antifungal properties that help control body odor.
Leaves: The leaves of Azadirachta indica contain compounds that help reduce sweat and inhibit the growth of bacteria that cause body odor.
Barks: The barks of Azadirachta indica contain bioactive compounds that help reduce inflammation and fight against bacteria and fungi that cause body odor.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried azadirachta indica leaves and flowers to ensure freshness and potency of the capsules.
Grind the dried azadirachta indica leaves and flowers into a fine powder using a grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix 10 grams of the powdered azadirachta indica with 5 grams of starch powder in a bowl.
Use a capsule machine to fill 100 capsules with the mixture and seal them for 2 minutes.
Store the capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 12 months.

remedies.remedy_desc: Silybum marianum capsules helps with body odor because they contain milk thistle, a natural antioxidant that aids in the elimination of toxins from the body. The active compound, silymarin, plays a crucial role in reducing the accumulation of sweat and bacteria on the skin, which are primary causes of body odor. By promoting a healthy gut microbiome and improving liver function, Silybum marianum capsules help to reduce the release of unpleasant odors from the body, resulting in fresher and cleaner skin.
remedy_constituents: Silymarin: It helps with body odor by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, which can contribute to the formation of malodorous compounds.
Lignans: They help with body odor by exhibiting antimicrobial properties, which can inhibit the growth of bacteria that produce volatile sulfur compounds, a common cause of body odor.
Flavonoids: They help with body odor by reducing inflammation and improving blood circulation, which can help to eliminate toxins and reduce the formation of malodorous compounds in the body.
remedy_parts: Seeds: The seeds are commonly used due to their high silymarin content, which has anti-inflammatory properties that help combat body odor.
Leaves: The leaves are used for their antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which help reduce the growth of odor-causing bacteria on the skin.
Flowers: The flowers are used for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help soothe and protect the skin from bacterial and fungal infections that cause body odor.
remedy_recipe: Harvest silybum marianum flowers and seeds in bulk quantities for future use.
Dry the harvested silybum marianum flowers and seeds in a low temperature oven.
Grind the dried silybum marianum flowers and seeds into a fine powder.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the powdered silybum marianum mixture.
Store the filled silybum marianum capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place.

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe barbadensis capsules helps with body odor because they contain a rich source of antibacterial properties that combat the growth of odor-causing bacteria on the skin. The capsules also contain vitamins and minerals that promote healthy digestion, which in turn helps to eliminate toxins and waste products that can contribute to body odor. By supporting skin health and detoxification, Aloe vera capsules can help to reduce body odor and leave a fresh, clean scent. This can be especially beneficial for individuals who engage in physical activity or live in warm climates.
remedy_constituents: Aldehydes: These organic compounds help reduce body odor by breaking down and eliminating the bacteria that cause bad smells.
Furanochromones: These compounds inhibit the growth of odor-causing bacteria, thereby reducing the production of volatile organic compounds (VOCs) responsible for body odor.
Cinnamaldehyde: This terpene has antimicrobial properties that help eliminate odor-causing bacteria and reduce sweat's pH level, which makes it less conducive to bacterial growth and body odor.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Aloe vera leaves are the most commonly used part for body odor capsules due to their high concentration of aloe vera gel, which has antibacterial and antifungal properties.
Rhyzomes: Aloe rhyzomes contain aloin, a compound that helps to reduce body odor by inhibiting the growth of odor-causing bacteria.
Seeds: Aloe seeds are rich in fatty acids, which have been found to have antimicrobial properties that help to combat body odor-causing microorganisms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 mature aloe barbadensis leaves with a thick green rind and store them in a dry cool place.
Dry the aloe leaves in a single layer at 50-60 degrees celsius for 24 to 48 hours.
Grind 10-15 dried aloe leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 500mg of aloe powder with 500mg of an excipient like calcium carbonate in a small bowl.
Fill 100-200 empty capsules with the aloe mixture using a capsule filling machine or a spoon.

remedies.remedy_desc: Cinnamomum zeylanicum capsules helps with body odor because of its natural antifungal and antibacterial properties. The active compounds present in these capsules, particularly cinnamaldehyde, work to combat the growth of microorganisms that cause body odor. By reducing the presence of these odor-causing bacteria, Cinnamomum zeylanicum capsules help to neutralize unpleasant smells. Regular consumption of these capsules may also promote a healthier gut microbiome, further contributing to its deodorizing effects and overall body freshness.
remedy_constituents: Cinnamaldehyde: This compound has antimicrobial properties, which help in reducing the growth of bacteria that cause body odor.
Eugenol: Eugenol has a deodorizing effect and helps in suppressing the production of volatile organic compounds (VOCs) that contribute to body odor.
Linalool: This terpene has antiseptic and antifungal properties, which aid in controlling the fungal and bacterial growth that can lead to body odor.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in oil that has antibacterial properties, helping to reduce body odor-causing bacteria.
Barks: Containing cinnamon oil, which has antifungal and antibacterial properties that help prevent odor-causing bacteria growth.
Rhyzomes: Rich in oils that have antiseptic properties, helping to reduce sweat and prevent body odor.
remedy_recipe: Grind 500 grams of cinnamomum zeylanicum bark into fine powder using a mill or grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix 250 grams of the cinnamomum zeylanicum powder with 200 grams of gelatin in a bowl.
Heat 500 milliliters of water to 80 degrees celsius and add the gelatin mixture stirring constantly for 5 minutes.
Pour the mixture into a capsule mold and refrigerate at 4 degrees celsius for 2 hours.
Empty the hardened capsules from the mold and store them in an airtight container for up to 2 years.
